message: Complete workflow: Branch → Nodes → ISS → Queries
ISS Overview: Index Scrolling System provides fast navigation through summarized branches using 3 layers (Strategic/Tactical/Implementation)
Branch System: Each project is a branch containing nodes (decisions, commits, docs) in knowledge/tree.jsonl format
Node Types: init, decision, commit, documentation, summary, blocker - Each captures different aspects of project knowledge
Use ISS for progressive context loading
reasoning: Loading strategic layer first (800 tokens) allows scanning 30+ projects vs loading 1 full project (25k tokens)
decision: Use ISS for progressive context loading

message: Missing Systems: Lenses (domain views), Tag Trees (hierarchical tags), Core Engine (tree_engine.py), Query Engine (advanced searches)
